short_description: Migrate Pastoral Care department to new BCMC email domain
description: Move all Pastoral Care staff mailboxes from the legacy bcmc.net domain to the new bluffcitymedical.org domain. Includes calendar, contacts, and shared resource migration. Rebecca Price and 5 other chaplains affected. Planned for a Saturday maintenance window.

short_description: Upgrade BCMC VPN client from Pulse Secure 9.1 to 22.x
description: Deploy updated Pulse Secure VPN client across all managed endpoints to address session timeout issues and patch known CVEs. Affects remote access for on-call chaplaincy and other clinical support staff. Rollout via BCMC MDM during business hours.

Swap out the aging Crestron AV controller in the hospital chapel and meditation room with a replacement unit. New unit supports wireless presentation from iOS devices. Low risk standard change; AV vendor will perform work during off-hours.

short_description: Re-enroll Pastoral Care iPads into updated BCMC MDM profile
description: Re-enroll department iPad devices into the updated Jamf MDM profile to restore push notification delivery for secure email. Affects 4 iPads in Pastoral Care including Rebecca Price's iPad Air. Requires brief device enrollment reset; staff should back up locally first.

short_description: Emergency restore of on-call phone call-forwarding rules
description: Immediate restoration of the overnight on-call forwarding rules in the BCMC telephony system following accidental deletion during a routine PBX maintenance window. Chaplaincy on-call coverage was impacted. Emergency change approved by hospital operations.

short_description: Install badge reader replacement at Oncology wing entry
description: Replace faulty HID badge reader at Room 300 corridor Oncology wing entry. New reader sourced from facilities inventory. IT and Facilities will coordinate access card re-pairing after hardware swap. Affected staff includes Pastoral Care team and Oncology nursing.

short_description: Renew BCMC staff portal SSL certificate
description: The SSL certificate for the BCMC staff intranet portal expires 2026-01-27. Standard renewal via the hospital's certificate authority. Brief 15-minute maintenance window required. No staff action needed; single sign-on sessions will require re-authentication after renewal.
